news.headline: Top tech press releases include India's largest IT IPO, app for private security, and HUAWEI's tri-fold phone. 12 updates.
news.summary: Today, the tech world was buzzing with the latest updates as reported by PR Newswire. One of the highlights was India's monumental IT IPO, making it the largest in the country to date. Additionally, a groundbreaking app was introduced, offering exclusive private security services. HUAWEI also turned heads with the unveil of their innovative tri-fold smartphone. These announcements, made on March 7, 2025, are just a glimpse of the constant stream of advancements in the tech industry.

news.headline: New video series pays tribute to Yogi Berra's legacy, honoring his storied career, values & faith. Produced by Catholic Cemeteries of Newark.
news.summary: In East Hanover, New Jersey on March 7, 2025, a video series called Legends Remembered has been launched to honor the late Hall of Famer Yogi Berra. This series delves into Berra's remarkable career, unwavering principles, and strong religious beliefs. Created by Catholic Cemeteries of the Archdiocese of Newark, the show premieres with a focus on the life and legacy of Berra.

news.headline: Public shaming spurs US to launch new housing program, aiming to provide homes for 500,000 low-income families.
14 top press releases in Feb, including revamped Lobsterfest, Honeywell restructuring. Big Game & Valentine's Day topics covered. (Date: March 7, 2025)
news.summary: New York, March 7, 2025 - The latest updates include the relaunch of Lobsterfest®, changes in leadership at Honeywell, and a review of trending events such as the Big Game and Valentine's Day. Amid thousands of press releases issued monthly, staying informed about developments on PR Newswire is a challenge.

news.headline: Taylor Morrison celebrates Women in Construction Week by increasing number of women in construction roles, continuing to break barriers in workforce. #TaylorMorrison #WomenInConstruction #TMHC
news.summary: One of the leading homebuilders in America, Taylor Morrison, headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, marked Women in Construction Week on March 7, 2025. The company, known as America's Most Trusted® Home Builder and listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TMHC, is making significant strides in promoting gender diversity with a rising number of women entering its workforce.

news.headline: AltaGas reported strong 2024 results with normalized EBITDA of $1,769 million, Utilities segment saw revenue increase with $186 million income before taxes. Midstream reported $182 million normal EBITDA; REEF construction progresses. The Company's expected 2025 full year guidance remains constant. CEO optimistic about ongoing projects and initiatives for future growth.
news.summary: The article discusses AltaGas Ltd.'s financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, highlighting a strong performance across its business segments. The company reported a normalized EPS of $0.76 in Q4 and $2.18 for the full year, with normalized EBITDA of $520 million in Q4 and $1,769 million for the year. The Utilities segment saw normalized EBITDA of $336 million in Q4, with Midstream reporting $182 million. The company invested heavily in its Utilities business, focusing on asset modernization and system enhancements. AltaGas also advanced various growth projects, such as the Ridley Island Energy Export Facility and Pipestone II. Furthermore, the company entered several long-term supply agreements and experienced a steady performance in global export volumes. AltaGas reaffirmed its 2025 guidance of normalized EBITDA between $1,775 million to $1,875 million. CEO Vern Yu expressed satisfaction with the company's performance, emphasizing operational execution and long-term energy fundamentals. Altogether, AltaGas demonstrated strong financial results and strategic advancements in its operational sectors.

news.headline: BJ’s Wholesale Club's new location opens on March 7 in Southern Pines, NC, offering low fuel prices and savings.
news.summary: BJ’s Wholesale Club (NYSE: BJ) has revealed that its new club in Southern Pines, North Carolina, located at 205 Southern Road, will officially open to the public today, March 7, 2025. This location will boast an on-site BJ’s Gas station, providing customers with competitive fuel prices and the opportunity for additional discounts through the BJ’s Fuel Saver Program. With a focus on offering exceptional value, members can expect savings on a wide range of daily essentials, including fresh produce, deli items, and more.

news.headline: Namibox, under Jinxin Technology Holding Company, integrates DeepSeek AI model for K9 digital education. (Characters: 94)
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Shanghai, Jinxin Technology Holding Company (Nasdaq: NAMI), a leading provider of digital-content products and services in China, revealed that its brand Namibox has incorporated DeepSeek technology. This innovative move aims to enhance user experience.

news.headline: Nano Labs, a China-based fabless IC design company, received $1 million in USDT from unregistered equity sale.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on March 7, 2025, Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA) revealed that the company, a prominent fabless integrated circuit design firm and product solution provider in China, received a funding of $1 million in USDT.

news.headline: Marieke Gouda wins two gold medals at US Championship Cheese Contest, claims total of 9 awards.
news.summary: In Thorp, Wisconsin on March 7, 2025, the US Championship Cheese Contest took place in Green Bay, where Marieke Gouda earned an astounding total of nine awards. The company expressed their enthusiasm over the recognition from the esteemed panel of judges and cheese experts.

news.headline: H&M partners with designer Magda Butrym for new womenswear collection available April 24th online and in select stores.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, H&M revealed a partnership with renowned Polish designer Magda Butrym, showcasing a new line of womenswear, accessories, and jewelry. This exclusive collection will be launched on April 24th, accessible for purchase online at hm.com and at chosen retail outlets.

news.headline: DriveCentric becomes fully certified as a NextGen CRM partner with BMW NA, solidifying its leadership in automotive CRM.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in St. Louis, DriveCentric revealed its achievement of full certification as a NextGen CRM partner with BMW North America (BMW NA). This accreditation establishes DriveCentric as a top player in automotive CRM, with a focus on Augmented Intelligence and engagement strategies.

news.headline: Consumers Energy in Jackson, Mich. celebrates Women's Day and Women's History Month for their role in advancing company's Reliability Roadmap.
news.summary: In Jackson, Michigan on March 7, 2025, Consumers Energy commemorates International Women's Day and Women's History Month by acknowledging women's outstanding impact on the energy sector. The company highlights women's pivotal role in driving forward the Reliability Roadmap.

news.headline: Joseph Campagna joins Xairos to lead quantum Alt-PNT system architecture, bringing expertise in photonics and quantum communications.
news.summary: A seasoned professional in photonics, quantum communications, and space, Joseph Campagna, has recently joined Xairos in Lafayette, Colorado to spearhead the development of the quantum Alt-PNT system architecture. This move signifies a significant development in the company's strategic direction and focus on cutting-edge technologies. Campagna's expertise in these fields positions Xairos strongly in the rapidly evolving quantum technology landscape.

news.headline: Cleveland-Cliffs offers $1,000 bonus to 30,000 employees buying American-built vehicles with Cliffs steel in 2025.
news.summary: Cleveland-Cliffs Inc. (NYSE: CLF) revealed plans to provide a "Buy American" incentive program to its workforce of around 30,000 employees. Throughout 2025, employees who buy or lease a new American-made vehicle featuring significant Cliffs' steel components will earn a $1,000 cash bonus. Lourenco Goncalves, Chairman, President, and CEO of Cleveland-Cliffs, expressed satisfaction in contributing to President Trump's initiative with this scheme.

news.headline: Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) releases 2024 tax packages online; expected to complete mailing by March 11, 2025.
news.summary: Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) has revealed that the 2024 tax packages, containing Schedule K-1s, are currently accessible online. Investors can access the 2024 tax package via the K-1 Tax Package Support website at www.taxpackagesupport.com/Genesis or through the K-1 Tax Information link on the company’s website at www.genesisenergy.com. The partnership plans to finish mailing out the 2024 Genesis Energy, L.P. tax packages by Tuesday, March 11th, 2025. For more details, individuals are advised to visit the aforementioned websites.

news.headline: Dunkin' launches $125,000 scholarship program for DMV students, awarding $2,500 each to 50 students for 2025.
news.summary: Washington and Baltimore, Maryland - Dunkin' has reintroduced its fourth annual Dunkin' Regional Scholarship Program, offering $125,000 in scholarships to students in the DMV area. Partnering with Scholarship America, Dunkin' will grant $2,500 academic scholarships to 50 students in the DMV region for enrollment in a two- or four-year college, university, or vocational-technical school of their choosing for Fall 2025.

news.headline: Jazwares Cares donates largest single Squishmallows to celebrate Squishmallows Day, benefiting children worldwide.
news.summary: In Plantation, Florida, Jazwares Cares, the philanthropic arm of the global toy company Jazwares, is commemorating the third-annual Squishmallows Day on March 7 by making a significant donation. This will be the largest single donation of Squishmallows ever made, benefiting children and families in the U.S., Europe, and Australia. Laura Zebersky, President and Chief Commercial Officer at Jazwares, stated, “Putting smiles on children’s faces is our primary goal.”

news.headline: Dunkin' launches 16th Philadelphia scholarship program, offering $100,000 to award $5,000 academic scholarships to 20 students.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, Dunkin'® and its local franchisees have introduced the sixteenth annual Dunkin' Philadelphia Regional Scholarship Program. This initiative will provide $100,000 in scholarships to students in the area. In partnership with Scholarship America, Dunkin’ will grant $5,000 academic scholarships to 20 students across Greater Philadelphia. The scholarships aim to support students attending accredited two- or four-year colleges, universities, or vocational-technical schools in the region.

news.headline: US's assistance to Ukraine proves to be a beneficial investment.
Investors jittery as job report looms. Concerns grow over economic growth and impact of tariffs on top trading partners.
news.summary: Concerns have been growing among investors regarding economic growth and the impact of tariffs on the top trading partners of the United States.

news.headline: Anika sells Parcus Medical to sharpen focus on hyaluronic acid OA pain management and regenerative solutions.
news.summary: The implementation of the recently announced plan has intensified the company's focus on hyaluronic acid-based osteoarthritis (OA) pain management and rapidly expanding regenerative solutions portfolio. This strategic move aims to capitalize on the growing demand in these sectors. The plan underscores a clear direction towards maximizing opportunities in the hyaluronic acid-driven OA pain management market and advancing the high-growth regenerative solutions portfolio. This focused approach is geared towards enhancing the company's position in these lucrative markets.

news.headline: Katapult (NASDAQ: KPLT) to announce Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 28, 2025 at 8:00 AM ET.
news.summary: A Texas-based financial technology company, Katapult Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: KPLT), revealed its plan to unveil the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on Friday, March 28, 2025. The announcement of the release was made today. The company is set to disclose the figures before the market opens and will further conduct a conference call along with a webcast at 8:00 AM ET on the same day to delve into the results.

news.headline: Tulikivi Corp's financial report for 1–12/2024: Improved balance sheet with equity ratio at 51.9%.
Mullen Group Ltd. renews normal course issuer bid for shares and gets approval for debentures bid from TSX on March 07, 2025.
news.summary: In Okotoks, Alberta, on March 07, 2025, Mullen Group Ltd. (TSX: MTL) has been granted approval by the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) to renew its normal course issuer bid for common shares and to start a normal course issuer bid for the 5.75% Convertible Unsecured Subordinated Debentures. The Bid encompasses the renewal of the normal course issuer bid for Shares and the approval of the normal course issuer bid for the Debentures.

news.headline: Potential for China to rival US reserves using 195,000 seized Bitcoins from PlusToken Ponzi scheme.
news.summary: China still holds 195,000 Bitcoin acquired from the PlusToken Ponzi scheme, without having sold them yet. With this amount, China could potentially create a reserve similar to that of the United States.

news.headline: UCLOUDLINK (NASDAQ: UCL) approved for pilot operations of value-added telecoms services by China's MIIT.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on March 07, 2025, UCLOUDLINK GROUP INC. (NASDAQ: UCL), a pioneering mobile data traffic sharing marketplace, disclosed being among the initial 13 foreign-invested firms sanctioned for trial operations of value-added telecom services by China's Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT). Following this approval, UCLOUDLINK can partake in services including internet access and information provision within China.

news.headline: Private prisons are increasing immigrant detention, with Trump admin set to utilize thousands more beds for mass deportation.
news.summary: The administration of President Trump is anticipated to utilize additional beds in these facilities, potentially increasing the capacity by thousands, for the purpose of executing its mass deportation plan.

news.headline: European stocks may have more room to grow, according to Amundi.
Longsys made its debut at MWC 2025 in Barcelona on March 3. It is a semiconductor memory enterprise with the theme "New Mode of Storage Empowering Global Mobility".
news.summary: A branded semiconductor memory enterprise, Longsys (SZ.301308), appeared at MWC 2025 in Barcelona on March 3 for the first time. The event focused on the theme "New Mode of Storage Empowering Global Mobility", with Longsys introducing a range of innovative storage solutions.

news.headline: US stock futures likely to open higher after Nasdaq 100 enters correction zone; all benchmark futures up in premarket. President Trump's administration delays USMCA goods levy. U.S. jobs report, unemployment rate, hourly wages data awaited. 10-year Treasury yield at 4.26%, two-year yield at 3.95%. S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 ETFs rise in premarket, tech and consumer sectors face losses. US records $131.4 billion trade deficit in January, unit labor costs rise 2.2% in Q4. Kroger reports strong Q4 earnings. Analysis highlights possibility of market recovery with solid U.S. economic fundamentals.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures rose following a previous selloff, with Nasdaq 100 in correction zone. Trump administration postponed USMCA goods tariffs. Investors await U.S. jobs report; 10-year Treasury yield at 4.26%, two-year at 3.95%. 91% chance Fed will keep rates unchanged in March. Futures: Nasdaq 100 +0.48%; S&P 500 +0.30%; Dow Jones +0.15%; Russell 2000 +0.19%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF rose. Record trade deficit and better-than-expected earnings reported. Index Performance: Nasdaq -2.61%, S&P 500 -1.78%, Dow Jones -0.99%, Russell 2000 -1.63%. Analysts see suspension of tariffs setting stage for market recovery in medium term, citing solid economic fundamentals.

news.headline: Kazakhstan official: I think most of Kazakhstan oil cut will be in second half of March.
SP Group A/S started a share buy-back program on Aug 26, 2024, referred from announcement no. 12/2024 of Aug 23, 2024.
news.summary: SP Group has announced the commencement of a share buy-back program on August 26, 2024. This follows the disclosure made in company announcement no. 12/2024 on August 23, 2024.

news.headline: Euro-Zone economy grew above estimates at the end of 2024.
Investors in Alarum Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: ALAR) should contact Levi & Korsinsky before April 15, 2025 regarding a class action securities lawsuit.
news.summary: A class action securities lawsuit has been filed by Levi & Korsinsky, LLP on behalf of investors in Alarum Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: ALAR). The lawsuit aims to recover losses for investors in the Company. Investors who incurred losses in Alarum Technologies Ltd. are part of the defined class in this legal action. The announcement was made on March 7, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Is US at risk due to DOGE cuts?.
MDA SPACE's Q4 2024 shows backlog of $4.4 billion, revenues of $347 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $71 million.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company reported a backlog of $4.4 billion at quarter-end, showing a 42% year-over-year increase. Revenues for the quarter amounted to $347 million, indicating a significant 69% year-over-year growth. The adjusted EBITDA was reported at $71 million, up by 68% compared to the previous year, with an adjusted EBITDA margin of 20.5%. Adjusted net income for the quarter was $35 million, marking a 26% year-over-year increase.For the full year of 2024, the company reported revenues of $1,080 million, signifying a substantial performance, although specific year-over-year growth figure is not provided.

news.headline: REPT BATTERO showcases Wending® Energy Storage Products at KEY-Energy Transition Expo with 5-7 March 2025 in Rimini, Italy.
news.summary: In the city of Rimini, Italy, the KEY-Energy Transition Expo 2025 took place at the Rimini Exhibition Centre from March 5 to 7, 2025. At the event, REPT BATTERO presented its innovative Wending® series energy storage cells and Powtrix™ energy storage systems at Booth B5, No. 151.
